creator: lightside@gmx.com
text:
Created attachment 185327
Proposed patch (since 437488 revision)

Patch to update devel/goffice010 port from 0.10.34 to 0.10.35 version.

- Add dependencies, which found by stage-qa
- Adapt pkg-plist

Look following link for changes:
https://git.gnome.org/browse/goffice/tree/NEWS?h=GOFFICE_0_10_35
or from gnumeric announcement:
http://www.gnumeric.org/announcements/1.12/gnumeric-1.12.35.html

The build was tested on FreeBSD 10.3 amd64.
